findings.title: AI-Assisted Hacker Compromises 600+ FortiGate Devices in 55 Countries
findings.summary: Russian-speaking actor used commercial AI to breach 600+ FortiGate firewalls via exposed mgmt ports and weak credentials in 5 weeks.

findings.title: OpenClaw Security Vulnerabilities and Misconfiguration Risks
findings.summary: Third OpenClaw security incident this week; ongoing misconfiguration risks despite rapid patches.

findings.title: Predator Spyware Hooks iOS SpringBoard to Hide Surveillance
findings.summary: Predator hooks iOS SpringBoard to hide recording indicators while streaming camera and mic feeds.

noted.summary: AI-assisted infostealer experiment on dark web forums. Short-lived.
Former engineers indicted for trade secret exfiltration to Iran.
